dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】3階

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to reduce the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>The Culprit is You!</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>범인은 바로 당신!</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【犯人はあなたです!】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>犯人就是你!</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When an ally uses an attack that targets all enemies, grants increased Attack to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and increases Priority of ally Mages by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color>.
description.kr: (발동 효과) 아군이 전체 공격을 했을 때, 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 공격력을 증가시키고, 아군의 마법형 캐릭터는 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (発動効果)味方が全体攻撃時、味方全体の攻撃力を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせ、魔法型の味方の行動ゲージを<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: (触发效果)友军发动全体攻击时,使全体友军攻击力提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并使友军中魔法型角色的行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies without <color=#28d9ed>missing</color>, and grants increased Critical Damage and Critical Hit Chance to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>. After using the skill, reduces the cooldown of the <color=#28d9ed>Thinking Time</color> skill by <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고, 아군 전체는 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 치명 피해 및 치명 확률이 증가합니다.\n스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>씽킹 타임</color> 스킬의 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、味方全体の命中と会心率を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせる。このスキルは<color=#28d9ed>ミスヒット</color>が発生しない。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,不会发生<color=#28d9ed>闪避</color>,并使全体友军的命中和暴击率提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。
